nest_description: Minecraft game servers including Vanilla, Paper, and Forge.
name: Minecraft Vanilla / Paper
description: Standard high-performance Minecraft server powered by Vanilla/Paper.
install_script: echo "Downloading server.jar..." && curl -o server.jar -L "https://api.papermc.io/v2/projects/paper/versions/1.20.4/builds/496/downloads/paper-1.20.4-496.jar" && echo "eula=true" > eula.txt && echo "Installation complete."
